revision.text: <noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R from ASCII-only |name=From ASCII-only title |from=a title in '''''only''' [[ASCII|basic ASCII]]'' characters |to=a title with differences that 1) {{em|are}} non-ASCII symbols, but 2) are {{em|not}} [[diacritical mark]]s (accents, umlauts, and so forth – use {{tl|R to diacritics}} instead), and also 3) are {{em|not}} [[Typographic ligature|ligatures]] (like æ and Œ – use {{tl|R to ligature}} instead) |all category=Redirects from ASCII-only titles |printworthy=no }}<noinclude> <!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{Documentation}} </noinclude>

<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R from ASCII-only |name=From ASCII-only title |from=a title in '''''only''' [[ASCII|basic ASCII]]'' characters |to=a title with differences that 1) {{em|are}} non-ASCII symbols, but 2) are {{em|not}} [[diacritical mark]]s (accents, umlauts, and so forth – use {{tl|R to diacritics}} instead), and also 3) are {{em|not}} [[Typographic ligature|ligatures]] (like æ and Œ – use {{tl|R to ligature}} instead) |all category=Redirects from ASCII-only titles |printworthy=no }}<noinclude> <!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{Documentation}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.text: <noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R from ASCII-only |name=From ASCII-only title |from=a title in '''''only''' [[:en:ASCII|basic ASCII]]'' characters |to=a title with differences that 1) {{em|are}} non-ASCII symbols, but 2) are {{em|not}} [[:en:Diacritical mark|Diacritical mark]]s (accents, umlauts, and so forth – use {{tl|R to diacritics}} instead), and also 3) are {{em|not}} [[:en:Typographic ligature|ligatures]] (like æ and Œ – use {{tl|R to ligature}} instead) |all category=Redirects from ASCII-only titles |printworthy=no }}<noinclude> <!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] </noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
